title: [Bug] Fix static assets on offline and gateway error pages
body: When a tunnel goes offline, the gateway serves an offline.html page on the wildcard subdomain. This causes relative static asset paths (like `/favicon.ico` or `/static/logo.svg`) to also route to the offline handler, breaking the images and styling.

issues.title: Inject base tag to route static assets through control plane
issues.body: Add logic in proxy.go and server.go to dynamically inject a base tag into the head of offline and error pages.
